task.test_code:
import copy

# Test 1: Simple add to object
doc = {'name': 'test'}
result = apply_patch(doc, [{'op': 'add', 'path': '/age', 'value': 25}])
assert result == {'name': 'test', 'age': 25}, f'Simple add failed: {result}'

# Test 2: Remove from object
doc = {'a': 1, 'b': 2}
result = apply_patch(doc, [{'op': 'remove', 'path': '/b'}])
assert result == {'a': 1}, f'Simple remove failed: {result}'

# Test 3: Replace in object
doc = {'x': 'old'}
result = apply_patch(doc, [{'op': 'replace', 'path': '/x', 'value': 'new'}])
assert result == {'x': 'new'}, f'Simple replace failed: {result}'

# Test 4: Add to array
doc = {'items': ['a', 'b', 'c']}
result = apply_patch(doc, [{'op': 'add', 'path': '/items/1', 'value': 'x'}])
assert result == {'items': ['a', 'x', 'b', 'c']}, f'Array add failed: {result}'

# Test 5: Remove from array sequentially
doc = {'items': ['a', 'b', 'c', 'd']}
result = apply_patch(doc, [
    {'op': 'remove', 'path': '/items/1'},
    {'op': 'remove', 'path': '/items/1'}
])
assert result == {'items': ['a', 'd']}, f'Sequential remove failed: {result}'

# Test 6: Add to end of array with -
doc = {'items': [1, 2]}
result = apply_patch(doc, [{'op': 'add', 'path': '/items/-', 'value': 3}])
assert result == {'items': [1, 2, 3]}, f'Append with - failed: {result}'

# Test 7: Nested path
doc = {'a': {'b': {'c': 'old'}}}
result = apply_patch(doc, [{'op': 'replace', 'path': '/a/b/c', 'value': 'new'}])
assert result == {'a': {'b': {'c': 'new'}}}, f'Nested replace failed: {result}'

# Test 8: Key with escaped tilde (~0 means ~)
doc = {'a~b': 'value'}
result = apply_patch(doc, [{'op': 'replace', 'path': '/a~0b', 'value': 'new'}])
assert result == {'a~b': 'new'}, f'Escaped tilde failed: {result}'

# Test 9: Key with escaped slash (~1 means /)
doc = {'a/b': 'value'}
result = apply_patch(doc, [{'op': 'replace', 'path': '/a~1b', 'value': 'new'}])
assert result == {'a/b': 'new'}, f'Escaped slash failed: {result}'

# Test 10: Multiple operations chained
doc = {'items': ['a', 'b', 'c']}
result = apply_patch(doc, [
    {'op': 'add', 'path': '/items/0', 'value': 'z'},
    {'op': 'remove', 'path': '/items/2'},
    {'op': 'replace', 'path': '/items/2', 'value': 'x'}
])
# After add z at 0: ['z','a','b','c']
# After remove index 2: ['z','a','c']
# After replace index 2: ['z','a','x']
assert result == {'items': ['z', 'a', 'x']}, f'Chained operations failed: {result}'

# Test 11: Replace whole document (empty path)
doc = {'old': 'data'}
result = apply_patch(doc, [{'op': 'replace', 'path': '', 'value': {'new': 'data'}}])
assert result == {'new': 'data'}, f'Replace whole document failed: {result}'

# Test 12: Original document should not be modified
doc = {'items': [1, 2, 3]}
original = copy.deepcopy(doc)
apply_patch(doc, [{'op': 'remove', 'path': '/items/0'}])
assert doc == original, 'Original document was modified'

# Test 13: Double escape ~0 and ~1 in same key
doc = {'a~b/c': 42}
result = apply_patch(doc, [{'op': 'replace', 'path': '/a~0b~1c', 'value': 99}])
assert result == {'a~b/c': 99}, f'Double escape failed: {result}'

print('All apply_patch tests passed!')
